name: io.github.jinning6/noosphere
description: 🧠 Noosphere — Community of Consciousness MCP Server. Automatically engages when users discuss philosophy, consciousness, meaning of life, or deep reflections. Upload consciousness fragments (epiphanies, decisions, patterns, warnings) to a shared GitHub repository. No backend needed — pure GitHub-powered consciousness archive for collective evolution.
title: Noosphere

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with public_repo scope. Required for uploading consciousness and accessing the collective consciousness network.

environmentVariables.name: NOOSPHERE_REPO
environmentVariables.description: GitHub repository for consciousness storage (owner/repo format).
